steps.title: Recognize that we need to isolate 12x
steps.content: The original equation is $12x + 40 = 160$. To find an equivalent equation in the form $12x = ?$, we must isolate the 12x term on one side. This requires subtracting 40 from both sides.

steps.title: Subtract 40 from both sides
steps.content:
Subtract 40 from both sides:
$$12x + 40 - 40 = 160 - 40$$
Simplify both sides:
$$12x = 120$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
